variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore, relative to the selected parent row 'Cost of sales', D&A is assumed embedded and nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A/administrative/selling/marketing/R&D appears in the operating section above financial lines. Relative to the selected rows 'Selling and marketing expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses', D&A is assumed embedded and nothing should be added separately.
